executives.name: Andrea Sutton
executives.background: Andrea Sutton was appointed to the Board in June 2021. She has over 25 years’ experience with Rio Tinto and Energy Resources of Australia, including roles in operations, strategy and corporate affairs.

executives.name: Andy Lloyd
executives.background: Mr Lloyd has over 30 years' experience in the mining and resources industry. He has held senior executive roles with Rio Tinto, including as Managing Director of Rio Tinto's uranium business. He is currently a non-executive director of several other ASX listed companies.

executives.name: Chris Salisbury
executives.background: Mr. Salisbury is a highly experienced mining executive with over 30 years' experience across senior operational and strategic leadership roles. He was previously Chief Executive of Rio Tinto Iron Ore.
